title: VOLUNTEER PARK - Yelp
content: It was pretty relaxing and there were not too many people. There were a few photo ops and good to walk around. The water tower was something to check out as

title: View from water tower is amazing! - Volunteer Park - Tripadvisor
content: The water tower was a great spot and gave some awesome views of the city and surrounding area. A lot of historic information was also in the building as well.

title: Volunteer Park - Water Tower Observation Deck : r/Seattle - Reddit
content: It's a good climb. I used to always make a circuit to volunteer park and try to get up to the top. It was usually a slow pace at that point haha.
